description:
stub_fn_ids is initialized as an empty BTreeMap at line 2826 and never populated.
It is threaded through compile_fn and lower_prim but explicitly ignored with let _ = stub_fn_ids.

DECLARATION (delete):
  line 2826: let stub_fn_ids: BTreeMap<u32, FuncId> = BTreeMap::new();
  lines 2819-2825: surrounding comment explaining the deletion (delete comment too)

REMOVE FROM compile_fn SIGNATURE (line 3520):
  stub_fn_ids: &BTreeMap<u32, FuncId>,

REMOVE FROM compile_fn CALL SITE (line ~2858):
  &stub_fn_ids,

REMOVE FROM lower_prim SIGNATURE (line 5439):
  stub_fn_ids: &BTreeMap<u32, FuncId>,

REMOVE FROM lower_prim CALL IN compile_fn (line 3944):
  &stub_fn_ids,  // remove this argument

DELETE IN lower_prim BODY (line 6115):
  let _ = stub_fn_ids;

cargo build must produce zero warnings. All tests must pass.
title: fz-cg2.2 remove stub_fn_ids dead parameter
